title: Commander in chief
doc_html:
§2.  Commander in chief

The governor of the state, by virtue of his office, shall be the commander in chief of the militia of the state.  

Acts 1974, No. 622, §1; Acts 1992, No. 530, §1, eff. July 1, 1992.
doc_text:
§2.  Commander in chief
The governor of the state, by virtue of his office, shall be the commander in chief of the militia of the state.
Acts 1974, No. 622, §1; Acts 1992, No. 530, §1, eff. July 1, 1992.
